message:
chore: sync concurrent agent changes (settings, extensions, tests, perf reports)

Concurrent agent work from pi_agent_rust_verify worktree:
- docs/settings.md: minor update
- docs/extension-artifact-provenance.json, extension-master-catalog.json:
  checksum updates
- src/config.rs, src/extensions.rs, src/tools.rs: code improvements
- tests/event_dispatch_latency.rs: expanded latency tests
- tests/model_serialization.rs: test update
- tests/tui_snapshot.rs, tests/tui_state.rs: TUI test improvements
- tests/perf/reports: regenerated budget reports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -184,7 +184,7 @@ Accessor defaults:
 - `thinking_budgets.low`: default `2048`
 - `thinking_budgets.medium`: default `8192`
 - `thinking_budgets.high`: default `16384`
-- `thinking_budgets.xhigh`: default `u32::MAX` (effectively “no cap”)
+- `thinking_budgets.xhigh`: default `32768`
 
 ### Packages and resources
